### Post by bonzodog on 2007-11-27
> **RAV TUX said:**
> Trying to get this working,...

I loaded stylish and paste the two codes but NO black Ubuntuforums.org

Please help, reference:
[http://userstyles.org/styles/3992](http://userstyles.org/styles/3992)

You DID knock out the brackets in between the two sections of code didn't you?

It tells you there is a bit of code to edit to get it to work.

stylish has to see the code as continuous, and the way sections are marked up is fairly easy to work out if you read through it.

Anyway interestedinthepenguin has commented in the code about the bit you need to remove, including the header code at the top of the second bit.

Yes, it's a little complicated, and requires a basic understanding of CSS and html, but once you read through, and think about it for a sec, it's easy to install.

Yes, it's a little complicated, and requires a basic understanding of CSS and html, but once you read through, and think about it for a sec, it's easy to install.

### Post by Six_Digits on 2007-11-28
```
/**Ubuntuforums.org Black**/
/**Created by: Sasani07**/

@namespace url(http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml);

@-moz-document domain("ubuntuforums.org") {

body, #top, .page, .tcat, .thead, .alt1, .alt2, .tfoot, #content, #container, .alt1Active, .ubunu_loginboxfg, .ubunu_loginbox *, .ubuntu_unapbuttonfg, .ubuntu_unapbutton *, .sticky, .pagenav .vbmenu_control, .threadbit, #inlinemodform td, .ubuntu_postbit, .vbmenu_control, .alt4a, .ubuntu_quotebackground, #collapseobj_quickreply .panelsurround, #collapseobj_quickreply .panel, .page .panelsurround, .page .panel, .tborder .panelsurround, .tborder .panel, .tborder, .vBulletin_editor, .vbmenu_hilite, .vbmenu_popup table, td.ubuntu_poll_content table .ubuntu_poll_content, #top .submenu a:hover, .pagebody, .posttext {background-color: #000000 !important;}

.ubunu_loginbox *, .ubuntu_unapbutton * {border-right:1px solid #000000 !important; border-left: 1px solid #000000 !important;}

.ubuntu_roundnavbar_content, .ubuntu_roundnavbar *, .ubuntu_navbar, .ubuntu_announcefg, .ubuntu_announce *, .ubuntu_forumhomelayoutfg, .ubuntu_forumhomelayout *, .ubuntu_lastpostfg, .ubuntu_lastpost *, .uf_normal_roundfg, .uf_normal_round *, .ubuntu_navbits_info_content, .ubuntu_navbits_info *, .ubuntu_buttons_content, .ubuntu_buttons *, .ubuntu_postbit_content, .ubuntu_postbit *, .ubuntu_roundnavbar_content .vbmenu_control, .ubuntu_poll_content, .ubuntu_poll *, .ubuntu_announcement_content, .ubuntu_announcement * {background: #171717 !important; border-left: 1px solid #171717 !important; border-right: 1px solid #171717 !important;}

.posttop, #navbar, .pda {background: #171717 !important;}

/**top-nav border and bullet image**/
ul {border: 0px !important;}
#top li {background-image:none !important;}

/**searchbox properties**/
#searchbox #q {background: #171717 !important; border: 1px solid #233779 !important; color: #BBBBBB !important;}

#navbar, .post, .pagebody {border: 1px solid #333333 !important;}

.post {padding: 0px !important;}
.pda {border-left: 1px solid #333333 !important; border-right: 1px solid #333333 !important; border-bottom: 1px solid #333333 !important;}

.vbmenu_option, #top .submenu {background: #171717 !important;}

#posts .tborder, .pagenav .tborder, .ubuntu_roundnavbar_content .smallfont, #content .tborder, .ubuntu_poll_content table, #top a {border:0px !important;}

.tcat, .threadbit, .sticky{border-bottom: 1px solid #171717 !important;}

.vbmenu_popup, .vbmenu_popup table, #top .submenu {border:1px solid #000000 !important;}

#top li a, .ubuntu_bot_fdbits_tcat  {border-bottom: 1px solid #000000 !important;}

.ubuntu_quotebackground {border-left: 6px solid #353535 !important; border-top:1px solid #353535 !important; border-right: 1px solid #353535 !important; border-bottom:1px solid #353535 !important;}

.alt4a {border-bottom: 2px solid #353535 !important;}

body, #top, #bg-left, #bg-right, #bottom-left, #bottom-right, #footer, #container, #content {background-image: none !important;}

/**font properties**/
a, .forumhome_stats, .thead, .alt1, .tcat, .smallfont .time, .bigusername, .fieldset, .theadgal, .ubuntu_messagebody, .ubuntu_postbit_content .smallfont, .ubuntu_signature, .pagenav .vbmenu_control, .ubunu_loginboxfg, .ubunu_loginboxfg strong, .ubuntu_roundnavbar_content .smallfont, .alt2, .ubuntu_poll_content .smallfont, .page .smallfont, .wrapper p, .ubuntu_roundnavbar_content .navbar, .sticky, .ubuntu_announcement_content, .uf_normal_roundfg, .threadbit, .fieldset legend, .vbmenu_option label, .ubuntu_bot_fdbits_tcat, .posttext, #navbar, .username, .date, .largefont, .smallfont em {color: #ffffff !important;}

a:link, .ubunu_loginboxfg a, .ubuntu_navbar a, .ubuntu_announcefg a, .smallfont a, .navbar a, .vbmenu_popup a, .smallfont span, .fieldset a, #threadslist a, .alt1Active a, .threadbit a, .vbmenu_option strong, .ubuntu_roundnavbar_content a:link, .pagenav .alt1 .smallfont, .alt1 a:link, .alt2 .smallfont{color: #2744A1 !important;}

.ubuntu_hlite a {color: #274BBD !important;}

a:visited, #threadslist a:visited {color: #58668F !important;}

/**images**/
/**Ubuntu forums logo**/
img[src="http://ubuntuforums.org/imagesorig/ub2/ubuntulogo.png"] {width:0px !important; height:55px !important; background:url(data:image/png;base64,) no-repeat !important; padding-right: 202px !important;}

/**big folder image**/
img[src="http://ubuntuforums.org/images/uf/misc/navbits_start.gif"] {width:0px !important; height: 22px !important; padding-right:22px !important; background: url(data:image/png;base64,) no-repeat !important;}

/**tiny folder image**/
img[src*="subforum_new.gif"] {width:0px !important; height: 11px !important; background: url(data:image/png;base64,) no-repeat !important; padding-right:10px !important;}

/**'Go' search button**/
#searchbox button {background-image:none !important; width:0px !important; height: 20px !important; padding-right: 40px !important; background:url(data:image/png;base64,) no-repeat !important;}

img[src*="subforum_old.gif"] {width:0px !important; height:11px !important;
background: url(data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAsAAAALCAMAAACecocUAAAC9

Ablg6UYfktdYAAAAASUVORK5CYII%3D) no-repeat !important; padding-right:10px !important;}

/**'Forum Contains new posts, No new posts, Closed for posting' images**/

img[src="http://ubuntuforums.org/images/uf/statusicon/forum_new.gif"] {width:0px !important; height: 23px !important; background:url(data:image/png;base64,) no-repeat !important; padding-right:23px !important;}

img[src="http://ubuntuforums.org/images/uf/statusicon/forum_old.gif"] {width: 0px !important; height: 23px !important; background:url(data:image/png;base64,) no-repeat !important; padding-right:23px !important;}

img[src="http://ubuntuforums.org/images/uf/statusicon/forum_old_lock.gif"] {width: 0px; height:23px !important; background:url(data:image/png;base64,) no-repeat !important; padding-right: 23px !important;}

/**collapse button**/
img[src*="/images/uf/buttons/collapse_tcat.gif"], img[src="http://ubuntuforums.org/images/uf/buttons/collapse_thead.gif"], img[src="http://ubuntuforums.org/images/uf/buttons/collapse_alt.gif"] {width:0px !important; height:15px !important; padding-right: 15px !important; background:url(data:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAA8AAAAPCAYAAAA71pVKAAAABmJLR0QA/wD/AP+gvaeTAAAACXBIWXMAAAsTAAALEwEAmpwYAAAAB3RJTUUH1wkGBQA7XFSQVQAAAEVJREFUKM9jdHJy+s9AJmBhYGBg2Lt3LyOpGp2dnf+zIHOI1QizjImBAjBENbNgCQx8IYxfM7qCYRhg1AltctI3IyW5CgBjlxGyTROLGAAAAABJRU5ErkJggg==) no-repeat !important;}

/**Ubuntuforums.org Black**/

@namespace url(http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml);

@-moz-document domain("ubuntuforums.org") {

body, #top, .page, .tcat, .thead, .alt1, .alt2, .tfoot, #content, #container, .alt1Active, .ubunu_loginboxfg, .ubunu_loginbox *, .ubuntu_unapbuttonfg, .ubuntu_unapbutton *, .sticky, .pagenav .vbmenu_control, .threadbit, #inlinemodform td, .ubuntu_postbit, .vbmenu_control, .alt4a, .ubuntu_quotebackground, #collapseobj_quickreply .panelsurround, #collapseobj_quickreply .panel, .page .panelsurround, .page .panel, .tborder .panelsurround, .tborder .panel, .tborder, .vBulletin_editor, .vbmenu_hilite, .vbmenu_popup table, td.ubuntu_poll_content table .ubuntu_poll_content, #top .submenu a:hover, .pagebody, .posttext {background-color: #000000 !important;}

.ubunu_loginbox *, .ubuntu_unapbutton * {border-right:1px solid #000000 !important; border-left: 1px solid #000000 !important;}

.ubuntu_roundnavbar_content, .ubuntu_roundnavbar *, .ubuntu_navbar, .ubuntu_announcefg, .ubuntu_announce *, .ubuntu_forumhomelayoutfg, .ubuntu_forumhomelayout *, .ubuntu_lastpostfg, .ubuntu_lastpost *, .uf_normal_roundfg, .uf_normal_round *, .ubuntu_navbits_info_content, .ubuntu_navbits_info *, .ubuntu_buttons_content, .ubuntu_buttons *, .ubuntu_postbit_content, .ubuntu_postbit *, .ubuntu_roundnavbar_content .vbmenu_control, .ubuntu_poll_content, .ubuntu_poll *, .ubuntu_announcement_content, .ubuntu_announcement * {background: #171717 !important; border-left: 1px solid #171717 !important; border-right: 1px solid #171717 !important;}

.posttop, #navbar, .pda {background: #171717 !important;}

/**top-nav border and bullet image**/
ul {border: 0px !important;}
#top li {background-image:none !important;}

/**searchbox properties**/
#searchbox #q {background: #171717 !important; border: 1px solid #233779 !important; color: #BBBBBB !important;}

#navbar, .post, .pagebody {border: 1px solid #333333 !important;}

.post {padding: 0px !important;}
.pda {border-left: 1px solid #333333 !important; border-right: 1px solid #333333 !important; border-bottom: 1px solid #333333 !important;}

.vbmenu_option, #top .submenu {background: #171717 !important;}

#posts .tborder, .pagenav .tborder, .ubuntu_roundnavbar_content .smallfont, #content .tborder, .ubuntu_poll_content table, #top a {border:0px !important;}

.tcat, .threadbit, .sticky{border-bottom: 1px solid #171717 !important;}

.vbmenu_popup, .vbmenu_popup table, #top .submenu {border:1px solid #000000 !important;}

#top li a, .ubuntu_bot_fdbits_tcat  {border-bottom: 1px solid #000000 !important;}

.ubuntu_quotebackground {border-left: 6px solid #353535 !important; border-top:1px solid #353535 !important; border-right: 1px solid #353535 !important; border-bottom:1px solid #353535 !important;}

.alt4a {border-bottom: 2px solid #353535 !important;}

body, #top, #bg-left, #bg-right, #bottom-left, #bottom-right, #footer, #container, #content {background-image: none !important;}

/**font properties**/
a, .forumhome_stats, .thead, .alt1, .tcat, .smallfont .time, .bigusername, .fieldset, .theadgal, .ubuntu_messagebody, .ubuntu_postbit_content .smallfont, .ubuntu_signature, .pagenav .vbmenu_control, .ubunu_loginboxfg, .ubunu_loginboxfg strong, .ubuntu_roundnavbar_content .smallfont, .alt2, .ubuntu_poll_content .smallfont, .page .smallfont, .wrapper p, .ubuntu_roundnavbar_content .navbar, .sticky, .ubuntu_announcement_content, .uf_normal_roundfg, .threadbit, .fieldset legend, .vbmenu_option label, .ubuntu_bot_fdbits_tcat, .posttext, #navbar, .username, .date, .largefont, .smallfont em {color: #ffffff !important;}

a:link, .ubunu_loginboxfg a, .ubuntu_navbar a, .ubuntu_announcefg a, .smallfont a, .navbar a, .vbmenu_popup a, .smallfont span, .fieldset a, #threadslist a, .alt1Active a, .threadbit a, .vbmenu_option strong, .ubuntu_roundnavbar_content a:link, .pagenav .alt1 .smallfont, .alt1 a:link, .alt2 .smallfont{color: #2744A1 !important;}

.ubuntu_hlite a {color: #274BBD !important;}

a:visited, #threadslist a:visited {color: #58668F !important;}

### Post by Interestedinthepenguin on 2007-12-05
> **D-EJ915 said:**
> the fonts on the grey/blue/black ones are pretty low contrast, I wish they were a bit more "stand out-ish"

You are free to change it.  

In the blue and black styles, find ```
/**text**/
``` and change the hex numbers after the 'color:' entries.

For the black style, find ```

/**font properties**/
```

I am in the process of tweaking the styles, so look out for updates.:)

@ **Six_Digits** (and **RAV TUX**): I recommend removing the actual code from the page (Firefox does some undesireable things when when opening pages containing the code.) :)

Download the code here: [http://ubuntuforums.org/attachment.php?attachmentid=48865&d=1194046408](http://ubuntuforums.org/attachment.php?attachmentid=48865&d=1194046408)
